sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Give me justice, O God, and plead my cause against a nation that is faithless. From the deceitful and cunning rescue me, for you, O God, are my strength.

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: The Lord has done great things for us; We are filled with joy.

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm
sections.snippet: Even now, says the Lord, return to me with your whole heart; for I am gracious and merciful

sections.title: Be Forgiven
sections.author: Tom Booth
sections.snippet: Be forgiven, be forgiven, be forgiven of the sins that you hold on. Be forgiven, be forgiven, Jesus died and rose that you might know his love, and be forgiven.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Has no one condemned you, woman? No one, Lord. Neither shall I condemn you. From now on, sin no more.

sections.title: The Table of the Lord
sections.author: Dana Catherine/Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: There is healing at the table of the Lord  for the wounds of all the children he adores.  In his body that is broken,  the redemption that we hope in.  There is healing at the table of the Lord.

sections.title: I Will Rest in You
sections.author: Frank Jansen/ValLimar Jansen
sections.snippet: I will rest in you, O Lord; I will rest in you, O Lord. I will lay down before you my heavy burdens; I will rest in you, O Lord.

sections.title: Revive Us, O God
sections.author: Jesse Manibusan
sections.snippet: Revive us, O God, breathe into us the way of your wisdom, the depth of your trust. You are our hope, you are our light, O God.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
